hero.title: Your Trusted Partner in
hero.description: World-class mobile testing, automation, and compliance services for global markets. From smartphones to IoT — we ensure your devices work perfectly, everywhere.

services.title: Comprehensive Testing Solutions
services.description: From device testing to compliance certification, we cover the full spectrum of quality assurance for your products.

mobile.title: Mobile Device Testing
mobile.description: Comprehensive functional, UI/UX, and compatibility testing across 5000+ device models for global market readiness.

5g.title: 5G & IoT Testing
5g.description: End-to-end validation of 5G connectivity, IoT protocols, and smart device ecosystems ensuring seamless performance.

automotive.title: Automotive Testing
automotive.description: In-vehicle infotainment, ADAS, and connected car testing meeting automotive industry safety standards.

automation.title: Automation Solutions
automation.description: Custom test automation frameworks, CI/CD integration, and AI-powered testing tools for accelerated delivery.

compliance.title: Compliance & Certification
compliance.description: GCF, PTCRB, carrier acceptance testing, and regulatory compliance for regional market entry.

performance.title: Performance Testing
performance.description: Battery life, thermal analysis, network performance, and stress testing under real-world conditions.

industries.title: Driving Quality Across Industries
industries.description: Our expertise spans the entire connected device ecosystem, from consumer electronics to industrial IoT.

smartphones.title: Smartphones & Tablets
smartphones.description: Full lifecycle testing from prototype to mass production

telecom.title: Telecom & 5G
telecom.description: Network equipment, base stations, and protocol testing

automotive.title: Automotive
automotive.description: IVI, ADAS, V2X, and connected vehicle systems

wearables.title: Wearables
wearables.description: Smartwatches, fitness trackers, and AR/VR devices

smarthome.title: Smart Home & IoT
smarthome.description: Connected appliances, hubs, and ecosystem testing

global.title: Testing Labs Across the Globe
global.description: With offices and labs across the Middle East, Asia, and beyond, we provide localized testing expertise with global reach.

cta.title: Ready to Ensure Your Device Quality?
cta.description: Partner with us for world-class testing services. Get a customized testing plan for your product and market requirements.

footer.description: Your trusted partner in device quality assurance. We deliver world-class mobile testing services across global markets.

contact.title: Let's Discuss Your Project
contact.description: Get in touch to discuss your testing requirements. Our team will respond within 24 hours with a customized proposal.
contact.quickResponseDesc: For urgent testing inquiries, reach us on WhatsApp
contact.name: Full Name
contact.projectPlaceholder: Tell us about your project, device types, target markets, and timeline...
contact.successMsg: Thank you! We will contact you within 24 hours.

about.title: Engineering Quality for a Connected World
about.description: QAGlobal is a leading independent quality assurance company specializing in mobile device testing, IoT validation, and compliance certification. With over 15 years of experience and 200+ engineers worldwide, we help technology companies deliver flawless products to global markets.
about.missionText: To be the trusted quality partner for every connected device entering global markets. We combine deep technical expertise with local market knowledge to ensure devices work perfectly for users everywhere.
about.visionText: A world where every connected device delivers an exceptional user experience, regardless of market, carrier, or network. We're building the infrastructure to make that vision a reality.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We deliver the highest quality testing services with ISO-certified processes and industry-leading accuracy.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We work as an extension of your team, providing transparent communication and collaborative problem-solving.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Every test case, every scenario, every market — we leave nothing to chance in ensuring your device quality.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously invest in cutting-edge tools, AI-driven testing, and automation to stay ahead of the curve.

careers.title: Join Our Global Team
careers.description: Build your career in quality assurance with a team of 200+ engineers across 6 countries. We're always looking for passionate people.
